archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Variant) / Tactical Data Dashboard

background.description: Deepest Obsidian, used for the main application background.

surface.description: Flat, solid panels for widgets and cards. No transparent backgrounds on elements requiring text readability.

border.description: 1px crisp strokes for 'Technical/Grid' look. No soft, muddy shadows.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid Protocol. Dense, functional, optimized for scanning. Every pixel is purposeful.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

grid.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
grid.agents: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-gray-800 bg-gray-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl
header.logo: text-2xl font-black tracking-tighter flex items-center gap-2

wizard_stepper.style: flex items-center justify-between w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-12

upload_zone.style: border-2 border-dashed border-gray-700 hover:border-blue-500 bg-gray-900/50 rounded-xl p-12 text-center transition-colors cursor-pointer relative overflow-hidden group
upload_zone.icon_style: w-12 h-12 text-gray-500 group-hover:text-blue-400 mx-auto mb-4 transition-colors

agent_card.container: bg-gray-900 border border-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:border-gray-600 transition-colors
agent_card.name: text-sm font-bold text-white truncate w-full
agent_card.badge: text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full

social_feeds.container: flex flex-col h-[600px] border border-gray-800 rounded-xl bg-gray-900 overflow-hidden
social_feeds.header: px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-800 flex items-center justify-between bg-gray-950
social_feeds.tweet_card: p-4 border border-gray-800 rounded-lg bg-gray-950/50 hover:bg-gray-800/50 transition-colors
social_feeds.reddit_card: p-4 border border-gray-800 rounded-lg bg-gray-950/50 hover:bg-gray-800/50 transition-colors border-l-2 border-l-orange-500

report_dashboard.gauge: relative flex items-center justify-center w-48 h-48 rounded-full border-4 border-gray-800
report_dashboard.risk_item: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded bg-red-500/5 border border-red-500/10 text-red-400 text-sm

chat_interface.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-gray-800 bg-gray-950 h-full overflow-y-auto
chat_interface.message_bubble_user: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-2 max-w-[80%]
chat_interface.message_bubble_agent: bg-gray-800 text-gray-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-2 max-w-[80%]

interactive_states.hover: Always explicitly define hover text colors, e.g., hover:bg-gray-800 hover:text-white.

icons.usage: Use crisp, minimalist icons matching the 1px grid layout aesthetic. No filled icons unless for active states.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark nodes network for the empty state or background of the 'Upload Seed' drag-and-drop zone to emphasize the network/swarm theme. Use it with a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-gray-950/80).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Control Room Grid' protocol for the dashboard. Use border-collapse or 1px borders between panels to look highly technical.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use bg-gray-950 for backgrounds and bg-gray-900 for cards.
For the 5-step wizard, ensure the step indicator is sticky or permanently visible at the top below the header.
In the Agent Cards grid, use actual Emojis for avatars. Represent personalities through different text/badge colors.

For the Dual Social Media Feeds (Simulate Step), build a side-by-side grid layout (lg:grid-cols-2). The left feed simulates Twitter (use standard tweet layouts, blue highlights), the right feed simulates Reddit (use upvote/downvote layouts, orange highlights).
In the Chat Interface, layout a traditional sidebar + main chat area. Keep the bubbles tight and corporate-looking.
Ensure Shadcn UI components are installed and customized to strip out default white shadows/borders; everything must conform to the dark theme border-gray-800 rules.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='upload-seed-button', data-testid='start-simulation-button').
For the Report Dashboard, utilize Recharts (styled darkly) or visually distinct HTML elements for the confidence gauge and faction distribution.
